title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's continued success in the ACC Tournament is significant for local sports fans and the university's athletic program.

title: Virginia Secures ACC Tournament Win Against NC State
summary: Virginia defeats N.C. State in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas and Thijs De Ridder led the scoring.
charlotte_impact: This win advances Virginia further in the tournament, increasing their chances for a championship run.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament Quarters
summary: Virginia plays NC State in a quarterfinal round matchup at the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game is a crucial step for both teams in their quest for the ACC Tournament title.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Preview
summary: NC State Wolfpack meet the Virginia Cavaliers in an ACC Tournament quarterfinal in Charlotte. Tip-off at noon ET.
charlotte_impact: The game's outcome will impact both teams' standings and their chances of advancing in the tournament.

title: Charlotte Area to Experience Near-Summer Temperatures
summary: High temperatures will be approaching a record high temperature on Sunday.
charlotte_impact: Unseasonably warm weather can affect outdoor activities and may raise concerns about early-season allergies.

title: Shooting Near Walmart in University City, Suspect Arrested
summary: One person was hurt in a shooting outside the Walmart on North Tryon Street. A suspect has been arrested.
charlotte_impact: This incident raises concerns about public safety in the University City area.

title: Man Killed in Salisbury Shooting, Suspect in Custody
summary: Namyous Dejhmariek’Kali Jackson, 25, is charged with murder in connection with the shooting.
charlotte_impact: This shooting highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence in the Salisbury community.

title: Queens Royals Make NCAA Tournament Debut
summary: Queens University of Charlotte celebrates its men's basketball team's first NCAA Tournament appearance.
charlotte_impact: This historic event brings pride and excitement to the university and the Charlotte community.

title: Monroe Native's NASA Legacy Celebrated During Women's History Month
summary: Dr. Christine Darden, a NASA human computer from Monroe, NC, inspires women in STEM.
charlotte_impact: Darden's story encourages future generations of women to pursue careers in science and technology.

title: Gaston County Farmers Markets to Accept SNAP Benefits
summary: Markets in Gastonia, Mount Holly, and Belmont will accept SNAP benefits starting in April.
charlotte_impact: This initiative increases access to fresh, healthy food for low-income residents in Gaston County.

title: I-77 Toll Lane Policies During Major Crashes Clarified
summary: Confusion exists regarding I-77 toll lanes during crashes. Tolls may be lifted near crash sites, but not universally.
charlotte_impact: Understanding toll lane policies helps drivers navigate highways during emergencies.

title: Charlotte City Council Seeks Federal Funding for Law Enforcement
summary: Charlotte City Council seeks $10M+ in federal funding for take-home cars, body cameras, and police radios.
charlotte_impact: Increased funding could enhance law enforcement capabilities and improve public safety.

title: Historic Salisbury Building Transformed into Senior Housing
summary: A downtown Salisbury building has been converted into affordable senior housing.
charlotte_impact: This project addresses the need for affordable housing for seniors in the Salisbury community.

title: Authorities Seek to Identify Skeletal Remains Found in Lancaster County
summary: Lancaster authorities released a composite image to identify skeletal remains found in 2024.
charlotte_impact: Identifying the remains could bring closure to a missing person case and provide answers to their family.

title: Juvenile Arrested in Monroe Break-in
summary: Monroe Police detained a juvenile suspect in a break-in where a woman awoke to find someone trying to remove her clothing.
charlotte_impact: This incident raises concerns about home security and juvenile crime in Monroe.
